DECLARATION OF SHAWNDRA SIMPSON IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO QUASH FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL SURGICAL HOSPITALS, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL HAVING WITHDRAWN ITS INITIAL OBJECTION TO THE TENTATIVE RULING, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING ON DEFENDANT NATIONAL SURGICAL HOSPITALS, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. DEFENDANT NATIONAL SURGICAL HOSPITALS INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTIONS 418.10 AND 581(H). PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HER BURDEN OF ESTABLISHING MINIMUM CONTACTS BETWEEN DEFENDANT NATIONAL SURGICAL HOSPITALS, INC. AND CALIFORNIA FOR THIS COURT TO EXERCISE PERSONAL JURISDICTION OVER THE DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT NATIONAL SURGICAL HOSPITALS, INC. IS DISMISSED FROM THIS ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (THE COURT WILL REVIEW THE PROPOSED ORDER THAT WAS SUBMITTED BY EMAIL.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-14-2014 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel having withdrawn its initial objection to the tentative ruling, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT NATIONAL SURGICAL HOSPITALS, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant National Surgical Hospitals Inc.'s Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is granted pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure sections 418.10 and 581(h). Plaintiff has not met her burden of establishing minimum contacts between Defendant National Surgical Hospitals, Inc. and California for this Court to exercise personal jurisdiction over the Defendant. Defendant National Surgical Hospitals, Inc. is dismissed from this action without prejudice. (The Court will review the proposed order that was submitted by email.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Continued To May-14-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
